contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 10
- Description: @⁨Fatima⁩
  
  Haven’t heard anything from 3rd Eye Cafe based in Austin Texas.
  
  @⁨Fatima⁩ 
  
  I am proposing we will wait till Sunday and then on Monday we inform Santos about the outcome and thank him for his inputs 
  
  Meanwhile we should inform him that we are starting to explore marketing chocolate bars here in the USA. 
  
  Exploration is preliminary. We don’t need new pricing information from him. What we need to know from him are the dimensions of his chocolate molds for 50gram chocolate bars 
  
  Specifically we need to know 
  
  - height
  - ⁠width 
  - ⁠length 
  
  That way once we finished conducting our in-depth market research and decide to go ahead we have these information handy
  
  @⁨Kirsten Ritschel⁩ please do not get confused by the message I have past to  @⁨Fatima⁩ to have her pass to Santos. This is messaging we are specifically sharing with Santos to get the information we need while managing vendor expectations. Once I get to San Francisco I will be picking up the bars of dark chocolate you have already produced and will start selling them with the retail price target of $10 per bar. The signals we get from this sales effort will help determine if we have enough margin to shift production to Santos facility if we need to scale up so as to get around the 2 days a month constraints you mentioned you have during our prior conversation 😊🙏
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
